$comment: Curated MCP servers for the windsurf-unlocked starter kit.
All servers use Streamable HTTP (not SSE — deprecated April 2026).
Env vars referenced via ${VAR} — set them in your shell profile.
Remove the ones you don't use to stay under the 100-tool ceiling.

fetch.$doc: Read arbitrary URLs — replaces bespoke scraping

sqlite.$doc: Local SQLite — great for the vault/ and for quick data exploration

memory.$doc: Official MCP memory server — persistent key-value store

chrome-devtools.$doc: Google's official chrome-devtools-mcp (35k⭐). Gives Cascade screenshots, console, DOM, perf traces. Docs: https://github.com/ChromeDevTools/chrome-devtools-mcp

playwright.$doc: Microsoft Playwright MCP — scripted browser driving. Pair with chrome-devtools for drive+debug. Docs: https://playwright.dev/docs/getting-started-mcp

puppeteer.$doc: Puppeteer MCP — alternative to Playwright. Enable only if you prefer Puppeteer; otherwise the chrome-devtools + playwright pair covers the same surface without the tool-ceiling hit.

azure.$doc: Azure MCP Server 2.0 GA — 276 tools across 57 services. Uncomment and configure.

keboola.$doc: Keboola data pipelines — reference implementation of Streamable HTTP

linear.$doc: Linear MCP (official) — Cascade as an assignable teammate. Docs: https://linear.app/docs/mcp

postgres.$doc: Read-only Postgres — safe to give Cascade
